assets.title: Ask people to share a story
assets.description: Use this when asking pet owners to add an owner story to the project.
assets.alt_text: The Waiting Room Stories Project graphic with Chilli in a flower hat and the words Share your emergency vet care story.
assets.caption:
If emergency or specialist vet care became hard to reach because of cost, insurance limits, upfront payment, reimbursement delays, or lack of fast support, your story can help. Share your story: https://waitingroom.kingchillithepug.com/share.html

#WaitingRoomProject #KingChilliThePug #WaitingRoomStories

assets.title: Pattern Update share
assets.description: Use this when pointing people to the first 250+ Pattern Update and the owner-story charts.
assets.alt_text: The Waiting Room Stories Project graphic with Chilli in a flower hat and text about emergency and specialist vet care being out of reach.
assets.caption:
The first 250+ Pattern Update is live. Owner stories are starting to show repeated access problems around emergency and specialist vet care. Read the update: https://waitingroom.kingchillithepug.com/first-pattern-update.html

#WaitingRoomProject #KingChilliThePug #WaitingRoomStories
